economic_notes: COVID-19 impacted operations through travel restrictions, capital project delays, increased PPE expenditures, decreased ability to collect arrears. OFNLP gaming revenues may be significantly reduced due to COVID-19. Ontario First Nations Sovereign Wealth LP partnership interest held.
notes: Audit is qualified for multiple reasons: (1) prior year scope limitation due to lack of supporting documentation; (2) no budget comparison presented as required by PSAS; (3) inability to verify warehouse inventory for housing materials; (4) inability to verify occurrence and completeness of other revenue. Consolidated entity includes Webequie First Nation Band and Webequie Education Authority.
